We shipped the v2 auth rollout behind the flag this week. Still clean-up ahead — the legacy code path stays until end of month, then it's deletion time. No incidents on the rollout itself, which is the first time a tier-1 migration has gone cleanly from our group in 18 months. Credit to the team for the rehearsal discipline.
